use_cases: Contextual action menus for user-generated content like posts or comments
Floating action menus in dashboard and admin interfaces
Quick access dropdowns for document or file management systems
Action menus in social media or content management applications
ai_summary: Animated staggered dropdown menu component with smooth open/close transitions using Framer Motion. Features a clean minimalist design with indigo accent colors, staggered list item animations, and hover states with icon animations. Ideal for contextual action menus in SaaS dashboards and content management interfaces.
